setup_wizard.title: Welcome - Setup Wizard
setup_wizard.welcome_subtitle: Let's get you set up in just a few steps
setup_wizard.welcome_text:
Welcome! This app helps you understand your teammates in competitive games, even if they speak a different language.

Works with CS:GO 2, Valorant, Apex Legends, Dota 2, and other multiplayer games.

Here's what it does:
• Listens to voice chat in your game
• Translates what people say
• Shows translations on your screen

This quick setup will only take a minute!
setup_wizard.audio_ready_message: Your audio is all set up and ready to go!
setup_wizard.installation_message: We need to install a free audio driver to capture game audio. This will only take a minute!
setup_wizard.complete_instructions:
Here's how to use the app:

1. Click 'Start Translation' in the main window
2. Launch your game and join a match
3. Translations will appear as subtitles on your screen

Tips:
• Make sure game audio is playing
• Subtitles appear automatically when someone speaks
• You can change settings anytime in themain window

Ready to start translating!
setup_wizard.setup_complete: Setup complete! You can now start translating.
setup_wizard.exit_confirm: Are you sure you want to exit the setup wizard?

setup_wizard.macos_installer_message: On macOS, loopback capture is built in. Open Audio Settings, select your headphones or speakers (marked [Loopback]), then click Refresh Status.
setup_wizard.no_audio_devices_message: No audio devices found. Please check your audio setup and try again.
setup_wizard.welcome_intro: Welcome to SquadSpeak. This short setup configures your headphones, microphone, and translation language so subtitles work in your next match.

about.title: About
about.description:
Real-time voice translation for competitive gaming.

Works with CS:GO 2, Valorant, Apex Legends, Dota 2, and other multiplayer games.

Features:
• Real-time speech recognition using OpenAI Whisper
• Automatic language detection
• Live translation to your preferred language
• On-screen subtitle overlay
• Text-to-speech playback

Credits:
• OpenAI Whisper - Speech recognition
• Google Translate - Translation services
• PyQt6 - GUI framework
• WASAPI loopback capture - Audio routing

help.title: SquadSpeak - Help
help.quick_start:
QUICK START:
1. Click 'Auto-Configure' to set up audio
2. Click 'Start Translation' to begin
3. Play your game - translations will appear as subtitles!

AUDIO SETUP:
• Game Audio (Recommended) - Best for capturing game voice chat
• System Audio - Captures all computer audio
• Voice Input - Only captures microphone (not recommended for games)

SETTINGS:
• Translation Language - Choose what language to translate TO
• Show Subtitles - Display translations on screen
• Subtitle Size - Adjust subtitle text size
• Speak Translations - Play translations as speech (disabled for game audio)
help.voice_translation_help_text:
Voice Translation allows you to translate your own voice to teammates in real-time.

How it works:
1. Your microphone captures your speech
2. It's transcribed and translated to the target language
3. The translated speech is routed to a virtual microphone
4. Your game uses that device as microphone input

Setup:
- Enable voice translation in settings
- Select the virtual microphone device in your game's voice chat settings

Target Language Modes:
- Auto-detect: Automatically uses the most common teammate language
- Configurable: Manually select target language
- Same as teammates: Uses your main translation target language

help_center.title: Help Center
help_center.no_results: No results found. Try a different search term.

audio_setup.question: How do I set up audio capture?
audio_setup.answer: In Audio Settings, select your headphones or speakers. Click Start Capture, then play game or system audio. No virtual audio cable is required for incoming voice subtitles.

hear_game_audio.question: Why can't I hear game audio in my headphones?
hear_game_audio.answer: The app captures what plays through the selected output without changing your Windows default device. If you changed Windows sound settings manually, set your normal headphones or speakers back as the default playback device.

no_translations.question: Why are no translations appearing?
no_translations.answer: Check that the ML service is running, audio capture is started, overlay is enabled, your target language is set, and audio is actually playing.

overlay_missing.question: The overlay is not showing on screen
overlay_missing.answer: Verify overlay is enabled in Translation Settings. Try clicking Test Overlay, check that the overlay position is on screen, and make sure another application is not hiding it.

rms_zero.question: Audio capture shows RMS=0.000000
rms_zero.answer: This means no audio is being captured. Verify that the correct device is selected, capture is started, audio is playing, and your status logs show non-zero RMS when sound plays.

anti_cheat.question: Is this safe to use with anti-cheat systems?
anti_cheat.answer: Yes. The application uses standard Windows audio APIs and does not access game memory or inject code. It is designed to be compatible with common anti-cheat systems.

performance.question: Translation is slow or laggy
performance.answer: Try a smaller Whisper model, enable GPU acceleration if available, reduce audio buffer size, and close other resource-intensive applications.

model_loading.loading_translation_models: First launch: loading translation models (~1 min)
model_loading.loading_speech_models: First launch: loading speech models (~1 min)
model_loading.hint: You can browse settings while models load. Translation starts when both are ready.
